Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Carin Salter To Produce Documents Requested At Deposition
Off Calendar Feb-20-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nick Saenz for (petitioners) Carin Salter and Jennifer Segal. Darren Judd for (respondent) Glenn Lerner.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the request for documents. Mr. Judd stated that opposing counsel has failed to produce a log, has avoided producing the requested documents, that they have been in possession of the documents since August, there has been no privilege log produced and that they have limited their request to a handful of documents. Mr. Saenz stated that their objections have been the same since October, the requests for documents are overly broad, they are willing to provide documents with discreet categories and argue that it is unreasonable to have to produce/respond to 180 pages of requests 4 days before trial. Mr. Judd stated that the requested documents deal with the petitions filed and requests that documents be produced or allow to be heard on the merits. The motion for order compelling Carin Salter to produce documents, etc., was taken under submission. Both parties are to deliver proposed orders.
